title: Quiz and Practice Quiz next week
content:
We will have a quiz next week on the material covered in Lectures 1 and 2. The quiz will become available on Tuesday, Sep 23 at 5PM and it will close on Wednesday, Sep 24 at midnight. You can take the quiz anytime during this interval.

 

To help you prepare for the quiz, I put together a practice quiz, PQ1. Feel free to practice on PQ1 as many times as you want (it comes with 10 attempts, but I can give you more). PQ1 is for practice purposes and is not graded.

 

Please let me know if you have questions.
contentText:
We will have a quiz next week on the material covered in Lectures 1 and 2. The quiz will become available on Tuesday, Sep 23 at 5PM and it will close on Wednesday, Sep 24 at midnight. You can take the quiz anytime during this interval.
 
To help you prepare for the quiz, I put together a practice quiz, PQ1. Feel free to practice on PQ1 as many times as you want (it comes with 10 attempts, but I can give you more). PQ1 is for practice purposes and is not graded.
 
Please let me know if you have questions.
author: Iulian Obreja
